steps.title: Identify the plural noun needed
steps.content: The phrase “each of five ____” requires a plural noun for the five items being counted. Variable's (choice A) is singular possessive, not a plural count noun. We need variables as the plural form.

steps.title: Apply the correct possessive form
steps.content:
These kinematic variables describe the motion of objects as a general principle in physics.

The plural possessive form objects' correctly expresses that these variables apply to all objects' motion, not just a single object's.

This eliminates choice C, which uses singular object's, and choice D, which omits the possessive apostrophe entirely.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
